TEXT.source: NTU Corpus, Paiwan, Y2 one-minute spontaneous speech; source EAF: naming in Paiwan_yed01 1 min.eaf; anonymized speaker label: yed01

S.FORM: ai i sevucu ui nu aicu a aljak mavan a aljak na mamazangilan.
a aicu a aljak mavan a uqaljay ui e e aicu a mamazangiljan, aicu a tacemekeljan, tjara masudju.
nu izua e sele sedjaljep a ngadan, papungadan aya.
a uqaljay a uqaljay mavan a temalevak.
aicu a ngadan na vuvu a uqaljay.
a vavayan u uri masan vusam, maqati a temavelak aicu a ngadan a vavayan a vuvu uta.
a aicu a selevak maretjmalji e ina mamaw e sereva a caucau ui e amin a uqaljay maqati a masan vusam.
